effects.effect: Target 1 other [Dinuarian] card in your discard pile; add it to your hand, then place this card into your FP Zone, face-down.

effects.name: Dinuarian Elite - D
effects.effect: Your Opponent's Vivosaurs' Attack Skills deal -10 base damage to your [Dinuarian] Vivosaurs for each face-down card in your FP Zone.

effects.name: Lethal Waltz
effects.effect: Target 1 [Dinaurian] card in your discard pile; add it to your hand.

effects.name: Graceful Rage
effects.effect: Apply Confuse to the defending Vivosaur.
